notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, pitcher J.T. Ginn to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Zach Neto to 3rd. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, pitcher J.T. Ginn to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Zach Neto to 3rd. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Alika Williams singles on a ground ball to center fielder Josh Lowe. Max Muncy scores. Jeff McNeil to 3rd. Alika Williams to 2nd. Alika Williams advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alika Williams singles on a ground ball to center fielder Josh Lowe. Max Muncy scores. Jeff McNeil to 3rd. Alika Williams to 2nd. Alika Williams advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a double play, first baseman Nolan Schanuel to shortstop Zach Neto to pitcher Brent Suter. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil out at 1st.
